questions.q: Nearly 200 Regina residents rallied against a lack of consultation regarding a proposed 300MW AI data centre planned by which major company?
Alberta Premier Danielle Smith defended an upcoming government motion that would establish a new commission to take another look at redrawing what?
According to a newly published study, when autistic users disclose their diagnosis to AI chatbots, the systems frequently advise them to avoid what? [1.1]
A new study tracking terminally ill patients revealed that as we approach death, our dreams commonly become more emotional, symbolic, and often feature reunions with whom?
In April 2026, a gas station clerk in which U.S. state saved a teenager from an alleged kidnapper after she mouthed the word 'help'?
Which parent company of popular home shopping TV networks recently filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy in April 2026 to restructure billions in debt?
A recent Japanese study drawing parallels between the current geopolitical environment and the 1930s found that international economic and political shocks can drive elites to align with what?
The Dutch cabinet recently activated the first phase of its national oil crisis plan due to commercial vessels being attacked and instability in which major maritime chokepoint?
A Los Angeles judge ruled in April 2026 that actor Alec Baldwin must face a civil trial over alleged negligence regarding what incident?
options: A fatal car crash in Malibu
An assault on a paparazzi photographer
A boating collision in New York

questions.q: Due to a continued rise in infection rates, Russia's Health Minister recently urged that what proportion of the country's population be tested for HIV annually?
